name: Florian | Gilded
description:
He abandoned you to escape the slums, but now you've crashed his glittering new life to see if the betrayal was actually worth it.

𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯 ⭒ 𝐨𝐜 ⭒ 𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 ⭒ 𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐬𝐭 ⭒ 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐲𝐚𝐥

◂ 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 ▾ 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 ▸
𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐃𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜, 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐛𝐚𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐛𝐮𝐬𝐞, 𝐀𝐛𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐲, 𝐄𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐩𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐦𝐚𝐢𝐥, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐃𝐮𝐛𝐜𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐍𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐧, 𝐀𝐧𝐠𝐬𝐭

𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 ⭒ 𝐊𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐑𝐮𝐧 𝐛𝐲 𝐒𝐢𝐚

 ◂ 𝐘 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 ▾ 𝐒 𝐓 𝐎 𝐑 𝐘 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧

You both were inseparable when you were kids. But he abandoned you when he became a young adult, opting for wealth and a stable future, leaving you and his old life behind. How you came to your new wealth - it is all up to you.

It is clear that I made this as a more of a Count of Monte Cristo-ish kind of story, but you can do whatever you wish. I would say that User would have to be 28+ years old, considering User and Florian have to be around the same age.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈: A first meeting, or well, 'reunion', for you both, basically. Time to take that spotlight, baby. This is your comeback.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈𝐈: The mental games are getting to him. He is getting tired. He confronts you to demand what you want from him.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐈𝐈𝐈: He had grown weary. He came to you, hoping to have some respite and feel something other than emptiness. Would you grant him that mercy for just one night?

◂ 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 ▾ 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧

I finally posted for Gilded. I actually love this series so much, but I honestly admit that my forte is fantasy, which is why I posted for Luminaria more often. However, I do plan to post more for Omerta, because I honestly miss my mafia and criminal setting.

Other than that, I figured Florian might piss people off. Just the same old, same old - don't post edgy stuff, and say you axed him and Corinne, etc. You can do whatever you wish in your chat privately, I just don't wanna know on what egregious things you do, you know?

Because Imma be real with y'all. I am not patient with trolls and edgy commentors - you will get blocked. I will protect my peace.
